sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../../context/AuthContext'; import LoadingSpinner from '../shared/LoadingSpinner'; import AlertMessage from '../shared/AlertMessage'; import CertificateGenerator from '../CertificateGenerator'; const UserDashboard = () => { const { currentUser } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [certificates, setCertificates] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [error, setError] = useState(null); const [stats, setStats] = useState({ total: 0, pending: 0, issued: 0, revoked: 0, }); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('dashboard'); useEffect(() => { const fetchUserData = async () => { try { setLoading(true); setError(null); const token = localStorage.getItem('token'); if (!token) { throw new Error('Authentication required'); } console.log('Fetching certificates with token:', token.substring(0, 15) + '...'); // 获取用户的证书 const response = await fetch('http://localhost:5001/api/certificates/user', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, }, credentials: 'include', }); console.log('Response status:', response.status); // 尝试解析响应 let data; try { const text = await response.text(); console.log('Raw response:', text); data = text ? JSON.parse(text) : {}; } catch (parseError) { console.error('Error parsing response:', parseError); throw new Error('Error parsing server response'); } console.log('Response data:', data); if (!response.ok) { throw new Error(data.message || 'Failed to fetch certificates'); } // 检查数据格式是否正确 if (!data.data || !Array.isArray(data.data)) { console.warn('Unexpected data format:', data); // 设置为空数组，而不是中断 setCertificates([]); setStats({ total: 0, pending: 0, issued: 0, revoked: 0, }); return; } // 更新证书列表 setCertificates(data.data); // 计算统计数据 const calculatedStats = { total: data.data.length, pending: data.data.filter(cert => cert.status === 'pending').length, issued: data.data.filter(cert => cert.status === 'issued').length, revoked: data.data.filter(cert => cert.status === 'revoked').length, }; setStats(calculatedStats); } catch (err) { console.error('Error fetching user data:', err); setError(err.message || 'Server error'); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; fetchUserData(); }, []); const formatDate = dateString => { const options = { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }; return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString(undefined, options); }; const getStatusBadgeClass = status => { switch (status) { case 'pending': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'; case 'issued': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'; case 'revoked': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'; default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'; } }; return ( <>
{/* 页面标题 */}

Dashboard

{/* 欢迎信息 */}

Welcome back, {currentUser?.name}!

Here's an overview of your certificates and recent activity.

{/* Tab navigation */}
{loading && activeTab === 'dashboard' ? ( ) : error && activeTab === 'dashboard' ? ( ) : ( <> {activeTab === 'dashboard' && ( <> {/* 统计卡片 */}
{/* 总证书数量 */}
Total Certificates
{stats.total}
View all certificates
{/* 待审核证书 */}
Pending Approval
{stats.pending}
View pending certificates
{/* 已颁发证书 */}
Issued Certificates
{stats.issued}
View issued certificates
{/* 已撤销证书 */}
Revoked Certificates
{stats.revoked}
View revoked certificates
{/* 快速操作 */}

Quick Actions

Request Certificate

Apply for a new certificate or qualification.

Update Profile

Update your personal information and security settings.

Browse Certificates

View and manage all your certificates.

{/* 最近的证书 */}

Recent Certificates

Your most recently requested or updated certificates.

View All
{certificates.length === 0 ? (

No certificates found

Get started by requesting your first certificate.

) : ( {certificates.slice(0, 5).map(certificate => ( ))}
Title Status Date View
{certificate.title} {certificate.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + certificate.status.slice(1)} {formatDate(certificate.updatedAt)} View, {certificate.title}
)}
)} {activeTab === 'generate-certificate' && (
)} )}
); }; export default UserDashboard;
